label: BlueCross clean EOB
summary: Baseline insurer layout with standard service-line columns.

label: Aetna alternate columns
summary: Different labels, reason-code-first rows, same normalized claim.

label: UnitedHealthcare remark format
summary: Uses billed charges, paid by plan, you may owe, and remark columns.

label: Multi-page OCR-style EOB
summary: Member details, service lines, denial glossary, and appeal rights are split across pages.

label: Unsupported document
summary: Shows safe failure when a file is not an EOB.
